title: Rosewood Romeo Plastic Cat Litter Tray with Hood – Covered Cat Toilet, Charcoal Filter for Odour Control, Easy to Clean – Mocha/White
features: ODOUR CONTROL: Equipped with a swing door and replaceable activated carbon filter pad, it effectively circulates and neutralises odorous air as your cat enters and leaves
SPACIOUS & ACCESSIBLE: The large tray, with internal dimensions of 51cm x 35cm, suits most adult cats, while the swing door can be removed for kittens or cats unfamiliar with hooded trays

PRACTICAL DESIGN: The tray is extra deep with a higher back and a design where the hood's inner rim sits inside the tray's inner rim to prevent leaks. Comes with a carry handle and 4 secure, easy-to-use integral clips
EASY MAINTENANCE: Crafted in Italy with a glossy finish, making it easier to clean. Suitable for all types of cat litter
COLOUR OPTIONS: Available in two colours, allowing you to choose the one that best fits your home décor
description: Product Description The Rosewood Romeo Large Cat Toilet provides an effective solution for cat owners seeking a blend of privacy, practicality, and elegance. This large hooded litter tray is perfect for most adult cats, while it can also be adapted for kittens or those cats unfamiliar with hooded designs by removing the swing door. Its activated carbon filter pad and swinging door help control odours by circulating and neutralising the air as the cat enters and leaves. The tray's practical design, with internal dimensions of 51cm x 35cm, is complemented by a step height of 14cm and an extra deep tray with a higher back, ensuring comfort for your cat and cleanliness for your home. Its glossy finish, made in Italy, makes cleaning an effortless task, and it is suitable for all types of cat litter. Available in two colours, it's easy to choose the perfect match for your home decor. With the Rosewood Romeo Large Cat Toilet, you're choosing not just a litter tray, but a quality lifestyle product for your cat.
